title: licaria mutisii
intro: Licaria mutisii, also known as Colombian copal, is a plant species native to the Andean region of Colombia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Licaria mutisii include relieving coughs, colds, and flu symptoms, as well as reducing inflammation and improving breathing. The plant's resin is often used to prepare herbal preparations, such as tinctures and infusions, which can be consumed as a tea or added to other herbal remedies.
